question.content: In isosceles right triangle ABC with AB=AC and angle BAC=90 deg, define x=AD and y=AE+CD in the motion setup. Find only the x-coordinate of the lowest point of the y-x graph. Answer format requirement: <expr>. Strictly forbidden: any extra text beyond this format.

step_1.content: Fix the base geometric configuration and identify invariant relations.

step_5.key_point: Collapse multiple relations into one computable path.

step_7.content: Move to the extremal or terminal configuration and keep only the target expression.
